>>>>>CONTEXT POST:
Holy shit it’s been so long since I’ve watched this. I used to love it when I was like 10

>>>>>TARGET POST:
I love it too! It reminds me of granny babysitting on Saturday nights!

>>>>>CONTEXT POST:
Currently stuck in Carlow. Guess I’m not going to work

>>>>>TARGET POST:
People in Carlow have jobs?
